'''thachaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nichonage|nichonage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nichonage|nichonage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thachaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæchæbæth|thæchæbæth]] || [[word:thæchæbæj|thæchæbæj]] || [[word:thæchæbæsh|thæchæbæsh]] || [[word:thæchæbæ|thæchæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachachabath|thachachabath]] || [[word:thachachabaj|thachachabaj]] || [[word:thachachabash|thachachabash]] || [[word:thachachaba|thachachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachabath|thachabath]] || [[word:thachabaj|thachabaj]] || [[word:thachabash|thachabash]] || [[word:thachaba|thachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachafbath|thachafbath]] || [[word:thachafbaj|thachafbaj]] || [[word:thachafbash|thachafbash]] || [[word:thachafbaf|thachafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thachabatha|thachabatha]] || [[word:thachabaja|thachabaja]] || [[word:thachabasha|thachabasha]] || [[word:thachabaka|thachabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thachabath|thachabath]] || [[word:thachabaj|thachabaj]] || [[word:thachabash|thachabash]] || [[word:thachaba|thachaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thachabathal|thachabathal]] || [[word:thachabajal|thachabajal]] || [[word:thachabashal|thachabashal]] || [[word:thachabakal|thachabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thachabathatha|thachabathatha]] || [[word:thachabajaja|thachabajaja]] || [[word:thachabashasha|thachabashasha]] || [[word:thachabaka|thachabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thachabathan|thachabathan]] || [[word:thachabajan|thachabajan]] || [[word:thachabashan|thachabashan]] || [[word:thachabakan|thachabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thachabathaoro|thachabathaoro]] || [[word:thachabajaoro|thachabajaoro]] || [[word:thachabashaoro|thachabashaoro]] || [[word:thachabakaoro|thachabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
